snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedUnionQueryParameters

client = SeedUnionQueryParameters(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.events.subscribe(
    event_type="group.created",
    tags="tags",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedUnionQueryParameters

client = AsyncSeedUnionQueryParameters(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.events.subscribe(
        event_type="group.created",
        tags="tags",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
